item.title: Just flew first class for the first time!
item.description: Booked a job that flew me out in style, so got to experience the other side as a secret poor. FP edit - thanks for the positivity ya’ll, world’s seeming kinda dark all over so hopefully this post brought some good clean fun into ya day.
item.dc:creator: everythingiscomingupmilhouse

item.title: David Beckham gives his Instagram account to a Ukrainian doctor
item.description: David Beckham has given a Ukrainian doctor working in the city of Kharkiv control of his Instagram account, which has 71.4 million followers, so she can highlight the work of her medical staff during the war. Kharkiv, Ukraine's second largest city, has been the target of Russian attacks for some three weeks. Article: https://uk.news.yahoo.com/ukrainian-doctor-takes-over-control-185437033.html Instagram account: https://www.instagram.com/davidbeckham/
item.dc:creator: CiaranMcHale

item.title: You look out of the plane and see this, wyd?
item.dc:creator: MrMithrandirG

item.title: The Sweetheart Dance
item.description: My absolute Favourite to watch. In my experience, sweetheart dances are rare. The choreography! The matching regalia! When I was younger, I was always drawn to the songs, the dances, the regalia. But my parents were badly affected by the residential schools they went to, so we all missed out on this aspect of our culture. They rediscovered their spirituality in their later years. We do ceremonies, but we don't dance. I'm actually quite a good leather worker and traditional beadworker; I could very well make my own regalia. However, I'm SUPER busy at work (IT specialist) and actually in school part time (for financial management). Some day, I will dance. Sorry, I do not know the dancers, the year, or the location. If you can note credit, please do so! This is not my video. A friend posted it on fb and I thought you guys would like to see it! Edit - special thanks to @maxwilder for finding the source! Seminole Powwow 2020 in Fort Lauderdale, Florida https://youtu.be/ry58_SFpYoU
item.dc:creator: LeafofGreen

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Because I'm a fucking adult
item.description: This past year or 2 has been well worth it. I got out of a bad relationship and pretty much lived at work. It's been easy because I drive a truck cross country but I haven't taken any time off. I've had 5 days off this last year and 3 the year before. Friday I moved in to my own apartment and have been waiting all weekend for come furniture to arrive. Today I break my record of consecutive days off. Currently at day 3. I'm sitting in my own couch, enjoy a home cooked meal of chicken nuggets, and drinking whiskey and coke. Now to see what all this nonsense about Elden Ring is about. TL;DR: I'M A FUCKING ADULT DOING ADULT SHIT.
item.dc:creator: IPNBottless

Sorry for the split, imgur only allows 1 min video/GIF uploads (unmute)
I used my phone video editor. It was a bitch to edit just right.
item.dc:creator: zMike70z

item.title: It's a cool idea, but ...
item.description: ... adults in 2022 would just read a 'How to Act Like You Read 12 Books' article on WikiHow and scam Pizza Hut. Now if they changed the rules so you actually had to get your mom to sign it ... or if you don't have a Mom, the local librarian ... FP Edit - Yay, front page! Where's my pan pizza?? I decided to create some fun stuff for people to do - I'm actually working on a really cool 'Summer Vacation for Adults' project. Meanwhile, please feel welcomed to try something I just created: Interactive Top Tens - 90s Internet-style fun! https://inkican.com/interactive-inkican/
item.dc:creator: inkican

item.title: Comin' to save the motherf_ckin' day, yeah!
item.dc:creator: trustfallaccident

item.title: Cakeday 4.0 safe for dogs?
item.description:
Dog tax I forgot to post last year for my cakeday but...
I got my first round of the vaccine today!!!! which is a nice thing I got going for me. I have heard I can't drink alcohol between my rounds of vaccine which is a bummer. (but I completely understand) Edit: Wow frontpage thanks everyone! I didn't expect this to get so many points. This is my first favorite from like 3 years ago. So I wouldn't say I am an expert on the subject on what you can and can't give your pet. But the most forbidden grape/raisin item to give a pet is wine. (originally posted by @HallieSolo in r/u_JooSpader on 2021-03-21 23:48:46)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.description: Wow, FP edit...I didn't bother putting and commentary originally because my paint posts don't get too far. To answer some questions, it's acrylic, mostly Gaffrey Art Materials, and Liquitex Gels to thicken. Takes about 2-3 days to fully dry. No I'm not rich but appreciate those commenting who understand the cost of just making a painting like this (since I have friends who think I should just give them my works for free). Thank you imgur fam.
item.dc:creator: harleyamy
